sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ أَمْسِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam otišao u apoteku da kupim neki lijek.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy yesterday to buy some medicine.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَيْتُ الْوَصْفَةَ الطِّبِّيَّةَ لِلصَّيْدَلِيِّ وَهُوَ سَاعَدَنِي.
sentences.translation: Dao sam ljekarski recept apotekaru i on mi je pomogao.
sentences.translationEn: I gave the medical prescription to the pharmacist and he helped me.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِي أَنْ آخُذَ الدَّوَاءَ مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ بَعْدَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mi je da uzimam lijek dva puta dnevno nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: He told me to take the medicine twice a day after eating.
